_note: release/39 canonical Switchboard on-demand MAINNET feed map. adrena_feed_id range 142..255 reserved for Switchboard (see adrena/programs/adrena/src/state/pool.rs OracleProvider::feed_id_range). Crypto block 142-147 mirrors ChaosLabs (0-5) order: SOL, jitoSOL, BTC, WBTC, BONK, USDC. Slots 143/144/146/147 are Adrena-owned feeds on the mainnet on-demand queue. Slots 142 (SOLUSD) and 145 (WBTCUSD) currently reference BORROWED public-queue feed hashes pending Adrena-owned replacements — see `_source` on each entry. Swap-to-Adrena-owned is a pure config edit here + consumer pin bump, no program change required. Queue A43DyUGA7s8eXPxqEjJY6EBu1KKbNgfxF8h17VAHn13w is the on-demand mainnet default.

switchboard_feed_map._source: BORROWED_PUBLIC_FEED — not Adrena-owned. Sourced from Switchboard mainnet explorer. Adrena-owned feed TBD; swap via adrena-abi config edit + pin bump when ready (no program change required).
